analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that the EU and China held their 11th annual consultations on security and defence, with a link to read more. It highlights ongoing EU-China engagement in security/defence dialogue. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU successful story) – Not explicitly promoted; no reference to EU’s history, overcoming obstacles, or lessons learned. EU2 (EU is united) – Not indicated; no mention of intra-EU unity or agreement among member states. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not applicable; no claim about benefits within the EU to citizens. EU4 (EU avant-garde political actor) – Not supported; no claim of pioneering regulation or leadership in tackling future challenges. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – Not supported; no mention of human rights or defending fair causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Partially supported; the tweet presents the EU engaging in regular, institutionalized security and defence consultations with China, signaling multilateral cooperation and contribution to global security dialogue, which aligns with the theme of promoting cooperation and peace internationally. Conclusion: The tweet most closely aligns with EU6.
